title: Methodologie Heropvoeden en informeren van het (jonge) publiek over landbouw - "Fro de Bauer" (vraag het aan de boer) -
description: A methodology guide for educating young audiences about modern agricultural practices and addressing common prejudices through objective articles and active public relations. It outlines a three-trimester school curriculum—including mindmapping, seasonal calendars, farm production studies, multimedia materials, farm visits, and virtual reality experiences—developed under the Horizon 2020-funded Fro de Bauer project.
